basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B. Tech or M.E/M. Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering along with a valid GATE score.
qualification.details: B.E/B. Tech or M.E/M. Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering along with a valid GATE score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT Madras is 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E/B. Tech or M.E/M. Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering along with a valid GATE score to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online through the official IIT Madras website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test/interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Madras for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment and related information is https://icsrstaff.iitm.ac.in/careers/current_openings.php.
